headline: Lord Burger McMunchkin Creates 'Regret Burger' That Apologizes After Every Bite
summary: Comes with guilt pickles and sorry sauce.
fullBody: At Munchkin MegaBites, Lord Burger McMunchkin launched the world's most self-aware fast food. 'I'm sorry for the calories,' the burger whispers. Diners leave feeling full and emotionally drained. Dietitians recommend therapy fries on the side.
